# tiktok.gurubox.ai
# A free browser tool for creators to back up their own TikTok videos without watermark.
# No signup, no app install, HD MP4 download.

## Core Pages
- Home: https://tiktok.gurubox.ai/ — Main download tool
- How-To Guide: https://tiktok.gurubox.ai/how-to-download-tiktok-videos — Step-by-step tutorial
- FAQ: https://tiktok.gurubox.ai/faq — 12 common questions answered
- iPhone Guide: https://tiktok.gurubox.ai/blog/save-tiktok-to-iphone-camera-roll — Save to Camera Roll tutorial
- Android Guide: https://tiktok.gurubox.ai/blog/download-tiktok-videos-android — Android download tutorial
- PC Guide: https://tiktok.gurubox.ai/blog/how-to-download-tiktok-videos-on-pc — Windows & Mac tutorial
- Privacy Guide: https://tiktok.gurubox.ai/blog/does-tiktok-notify-when-you-download — Does TikTok notify creators?

## Content Principles
- All guides are based on real testing on iPhone 15, Samsung Galaxy, Pixel, and Windows 11.
- We do not store user videos. Files are processed temporarily and deleted immediately after download.
- We encourage users to only download content they own or have permission to use.
